organ: IM_d_kink_probe_v1: one-sided piece recovery STRICTLY OFF the locus (the joint channels' typed refusals lawfully live ON it, frozen Stage-A semantics untouched); two-scale gate (h and h/2 must agree exactly); termination certificate per side; verdicts AT-POINT PER-DIRECTION - neighborhood and sub-ladder claims explicitly out of warrant.

predictions.PMD.1: directional verdicts vs arbiter: every (point, direction, order) verdict equals the pinned analytic expectation - ZERO confidently-wrong (the HR134 Stage-D standing law: one confidently-wrong fails outright); off-locus first-order verdicts cross-checked against the exact dual instrument. Units: verdicts.
predictions.PMD.2: one-sided recovery exact at two scales: each certified side's piece derivatives are recovered IDENTICALLY at h and h/2 (the two-scale gate), the termination certificate gating one-piece validity; pinned one-sided slopes exact incl. the x*|y| pair (-3/2, +3/2) and the near-diagonal pair (63/64, 1). predictions.PMD.3: the refusal classes, pre-registered: ray_in_locus (5 pinned rows - locus-tangent rays where every sample sits ON the kink: the instrument refuses rather than inventing verdicts; the exact diagonal at the tie is one of them) and the cant_certify CONTROL (the crossing ladder that WOULD have certified confidently-wrong under a single-scale gate - caught at authoring, fixed by the two-scale gate, locked here: the control must refuse). Zero refusals on lawful rows. Units: refusal rows + control.
predictions.PMD.4: direction-resolved exhibits: at the SAME tie point, axis directions read kink (sides 0/1) while the near-diagonal direction reads kink with gap EXACTLY 1/64 (sides 63/64, 1) - the directional vocabulary measures what a scalar verdict cannot; the max3 trivariate tie reproduces the texture. Units: exhibits.
predictions.PMD.5: determinism: battery byte-stable x2 (sha256 over records).

referee: pinned analytic expectations (hand-derived) + the exact dual instrument off-locus.
status_move_rules: CL-M6 -> DEMONSTRATED iff PMD.1 AND PMD.2 AND PMD.3 AND PMD.4 PASS. A single confidently-wrong verdict fails outright (standing law); chain preserved, STOP, route to Will.
